spec_match.rationale: BroadcastChannel, IndexedDB, and importScripts comparisons create real data: and Blob workers and report observed behavior.

interactive.rationale: Each migration card has an independent live comparison with disabled/running/completed state and detailed output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Before/after code and live probes demonstrate why Blob workers are the migration pattern.

edge_cases.rationale: Worker errors and timeouts are surfaced; interpretations now follow observed results rather than contradicting them based on user-agent version.

references.rationale: ChromeStatus feature 6290352295247872 and the related origin-isolation demo are linked.

runtime_evidence.rationale: All three probes completed in the Chrome 149 test build: BroadcastChannel and IndexedDB showed opaque-origin restrictions, while importScripts succeeded from an origin reported as null. The page reports each observation without inferring behavior from version or import success.

accessibility.rationale: Live controls have native names and output is text content; code, comments, and status surfaces exceed normal-text contrast requirements.

design_system.rationale: Computed syntax contrast on black is 9.73:1 for keywords, 12.77:1 for strings, and 12.15:1 for comments.

summary: Raised effective code contrast and removed user-agent-based interpretation that contradicted real worker behavior. Live results are now the source of truth.
